subject: [PATCH v2 1/7] mm: list_lru: lock_list_lru_of_memcg() cannot return NULL if !skip_empty

2026-03-12.patch_summary: The patch removes NULL checks in callers of lock_list_lru_of_memcg() when adding or deleting items from a list_lru, as acquiring the lock will not fail due to cgroup hierarchy walking.
